svg.aria-label: Sheet Music for "Sleep Soond i da Moarnin'"
svg.style: display: inline-block; position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px;
svg.title: Sheet Music for "Sleep Soond i da Moarnin'"

text.tspan: Am G/Em Am G/Am | Am G Am G/Am
Am G/Em Am G/Am | Am G Am G/Am
Notes: Maggie pairs this with New Rigged Ship and Shelder Geo. I was pleased to see it pop up
in Pete Loud's collection of Northumbrian tunes.
Note on the B-part variant: I don't know why, but I always want to play the last C of the rising
run as a C#. I know it's out of the key, but I think it sounds awesome.
